title: Friday Sermon 3 March 1995
description:
Allah be praised that today's Eid festival with the blessing of Almighty God reached its closure in good weather with all its joys and pleasantries although all the weather forecasters had said that it would be a very murky day.  That there would be Sleet, there would be snow and it would be unusually cold.  But God has caused such a bright and beautiful sun to rise which is extraordinary and is a miracle.  When Allah decides to bless His men then all the predictions of others are falsified.  Only His is never false.  May Allah the Almighty always show such small and subtle theophanies of His love in favour of the Jamat because many a time the eyes are bedazzled by the greater theophanies but smaller manifestations nearby which are like expressions of affection towards children leave a very deep impression upon the heart.  So also pray hat Allah may show us small subtle expressions of His love every day such as delight the hearts of children.  

In addition to this today I only wish to draw your attention to the prayers offered during Ramadan with the blessing of Allah the Signs of the acceptance of which have been shown in certain good dreams and at the end of Ramadan, when I visit the Mutakifin and when I ask them they often relate such visions that in fact carry a message from the Merciful One.  It has nothing to do with the thoughts of the ego.  So were certain visions related to me with great astonishment especially by the ladies which I hope and am rather certain of it that the days are changing and that Ahmadiyya would progress even more rapidly than before and this journey of a century would go on progressing further and further in all its glory every year so pray that Allah may equip us for it.

With the Grace of Allah the Jamat is already trying very hard to fulfill the responsibilities upon us resulting therefrom.  More Summoners to Allah have been born than ever before.  However there are many who have yet been unable to join this company.  Make an endevour to prepare them to accompany you so that this Divine army also increases in number and so that the strength of faith should also increase.  We also have to carry out much work in the remaining months of the year.  So taste the fruit of your prayers in Ramadan through prayer and effort in the form of Summoning to Allah and enjoy it so that the world should receive the message that now this Jamat can never be stopped by any means.  It would proceed further day by day.  Each year Allah the Almighty would show us many many Eids.  May Allah make it be so.


The text https://www.alislam.org/urdu/pdf/Khutbat-e-Tahir-Vol-14-1995.pdf#page=162

Islamabad, Tilford - United Kingdom.
